text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I arrive at the academy gates...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, time to take on the perimeter.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're running the perimeter too? Then how
about goin' one-on-one with me?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Hishiama?! One-on-one? You mean... a
race?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You ought to be in good condition since
you're just startin', right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've been wantin' to see what you've got, so throw
everything at me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, wha—huuuh?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... The final stretch! I've got nothing left in me... but if I can overtake her here...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh, makin' your move now, eh? Bring it on! I'll
crush you with everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No... way... She's still got more in her?! I... I can
still win this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... It still wasn't enough... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Great job, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... You barely broke a sweat... You really are strong... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you were pretty good too! It felt so good to
run against an equal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now you're just being nice... Don't worry, I knew
how this was gonna pan out from the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? You geared up
around the corner and gave me a run for my
money.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I could tell how serious ya were! I've got to say, I
really dig that fire!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Th-there's no fire in me! No more
compliments, please!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Bahaha! No need to get all embarrassed! Anyway,
I'm gonna go run another lap. Let's do this again
sometime!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez, that was mortifying. How does she have the
energy to keep going?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've got no chance against someone like her,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Maybe I could handle... a little light jogging.
